case: The disappearance of Maura Murray: the college student who vanished after a car crash in 2004 and was never found
title: The Vanishing of Maura Murray
description: A college student's disappearance after a car crash leaves behind a trail of unanswered questions.

dialogue.speaker: ASHLEY
dialogue.text: In 2004, a young woman named Maura Murray vanished into thin air. Her car was found abandoned on a remote road in Haverhill, New Hampshire, with her body never discovered.

dialogue.speaker: BRIT
dialogue.text: Oh my god, that's so terrifying.

dialogue.speaker: ASHLEY
dialogue.text: Maura was a 21-year-old nursing student at the University of Massachusetts Amherst. She had just graduated and was working as an ER nurse in Manchester, New Hampshire. On March 7th, 2004, she left her job early to drive back to her apartment after being shaken by a difficult patient.

dialogue.speaker: BRIT
dialogue.text: How old were they when that happened?

dialogue.speaker: ASHLEY
dialogue.text: Maura's friends reported that she seemed nervous and on edge that day, allegedly due to a disagreement with her coworker. She drove home alone, but never made it.

dialogue.speaker: BRIT
dialogue.text: Wait, so she was driving all alone?

dialogue.speaker: ASHLEY
dialogue.text: Yes, her car was found abandoned on Route 112 in Haverhill, New Hampshire, around 8 pm. The police investigation revealed that Maura's car had been traveling at a high speed before crashing into a snowbank. Her phone and wallet were still inside the vehicle.

dialogue.speaker: BRIT
dialogue.text: That's so disturbing, how did she not crash?

dialogue.speaker: ASHLEY
dialogue.text: The accident report stated that Maura's car had suffered significant damage, but no signs of forced entry or struggle. Witnesses in the area reported seeing her walking away from the scene, allegedly with a large duffel bag in hand. She was never seen again.

dialogue.speaker: BRIT
dialogue.text: Oh my god, what about that bag?

dialogue.speaker: ASHLEY
dialogue.text: The search for Maura intensified immediately after the accident, but an extensive investigation yielded no signs of foul play or evidence leading to her disappearance. Her phone and wallet were recovered, but all personal items were found in her car, suggesting she may have been trying to leave something behind.

dialogue.speaker: BRIT
dialogue.text: That's so weird, did they ever find out what was in that bag?

dialogue.speaker: ASHLEY
dialogue.text: Allegedly, the contents of Maura's duffel bag remain a mystery. Some speculate it contained her belongings and personal items, while others believe it might have held more incriminating evidence. The police never released an official statement about what was inside the bag.

dialogue.speaker: BRIT
dialogue.text: This is so frustrating, I've been waiting for you to cover this one.

dialogue.speaker: ASHLEY
dialogue.text: The case remains a source of intrigue and speculation among true crime enthusiasts. In 2019, the University of Massachusetts Amherst released new information about Maura's disappearance, including previously unseen photos of her car and personal items found at the scene.

dialogue.speaker: BRIT
dialogue.text: So there were more clues?

dialogue.speaker: ASHLEY
dialogue.text: Yes, the university revealed that Maura had been researching a particular type of cancer treatment for patients with severe injuries. It is unclear whether this research was related to her disappearance or if it's just a coincidence. The investigation into Maura's death has continued in recent years, but so far, no one has been charged.

dialogue.speaker: BRIT
dialogue.text: This case still gives me chills, what about the family?

dialogue.speaker: ASHLEY
dialogue.text: Maura's parents, Karen and Bill Murray, have been advocating for their daughter's case to be reopened. They have released numerous statements and interviews over the years, expressing their hope that new evidence will lead to answers about her disappearance.

dialogue.speaker: BRIT
dialogue.text: This is the kind of case that keeps me up at night, I just want someone to know what happened to Maura.

dialogue.speaker: ASHLEY
dialogue.text: If you have any information about this case, please contact the FBI's New Hampshire field office or the University of Massachusetts Amherst police department. As always, be wrapped up, be nosy, and stay safe out there.

dialogue.speaker: BRIT
dialogue.text: See you next week.
